overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player moves from an outdoor dining terrace through a convenience store and up stairs through a vegetated urban park toward towering buildings with holographic billboards. The scene features heavy use of cyan and pink neon lighting with wet reflective surfaces characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

approaching food kiosk and shop entrance, leaving main terrace seating area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered outdoor dining terrace at night, illuminated by cyan neon strips overhead and pink underlighting on white modern tables. Several NPCs are seated at tables to the left while a woman stands near the right foreground. The camera walks forward past the seating area toward a food kiosk and shop entrance visible ahead, with a large tree trunk rising through the center of the deck.

exiting store to covered outdoor walkway with city views

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a convenience store through glass doors, passing a shopkeeper in a pink jacket behind the counter. After a brief walk through the interior, the camera exits to a covered walkway with vertical cyan neon posts and wet reflective pavement. The transition moves from the enclosed terrace to an indoor space and back to a covered outdoor corridor with views of the city ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park walkway with ascending stairs toward commercial district

approaching large building with massive holographic billboard, vegetation opens up

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs through tree-lined urban park, approaching towering buildings with bright holographic advertisements

various illuminated signs and advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a long ascent up concrete stairs through a dense urban park, with cyan neon light posts now on the left and thick vegetation on both sides. The camera follows a pedestrian ahead toward towering skyscrapers with massive holographic billboards and neon signage. The environment transitions from enclosed walkway to open park space with views of futuristic commercial buildings, overpasses, and palm trees silhouetted against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit dining terrace through a commercial interior and up into a lush, futuristic urban park. It begins on a covered outdoor deck illuminated by cyan and pink neon, moving past modern white tables and a central tree trunk toward a shop entrance. As the camera passes through glass doors, the scene shifts briefly into a convenience store with a shopkeeper in a pink jacket before exiting onto a covered walkway characterized by vertical cyan posts and wet, reflective pavement. The perspective then transitions from the enclosed corridor to a long ascent up concrete stairs, flanked by thick vegetation and neon light posts. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian upward through the park, opening into a wide vista of towering skyscrapers, palm tree silhouettes, and massive holographic billboards against the night sky.
